nodes.name: Little yellow flycatcher
nodes.summary: Little yellow flycatcher（Erythrocercus holochlorus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Little yellow flycatcher。

nodes.name: Erythrocercus
nodes.summary: Erythrocercus（Erythrocercus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Chestnut-capped flycatcher、Little yellow flycatcher、Livingstone's flycatcher。

nodes.name: Little yellow flycatcher
nodes.summary: The little yellow flycatcher (Erythrocercus holochlorus) is a species of bird in the family Erythrocercidae. It is found in Kenya, Somalia, and Tanzania. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References
